notes: erase/werase/clearok/is_cleared emit no immediate terminal bytes; their effect is deferred to the next refresh/doupdate (a different cluster) or is pure state. The byte crate reconstructs this empty immediate-output contract; it does not model the deferred repaint.
oracle_method: initscr; <fn>; endwin under 80x24 pty; per-call output isolated by in-buffer markers
